data.name: My Sadistic Girlfriends 2
data.detailed_description:
Rikina and Kyoka, your 302 and 303cm tall, sadistic, yandere girlfriends, have made you climax and splurt your cum all over Kyoka, so now the two of them manhandle you and carry you to the shower, where they continue to bully and torment you for their sadistic pleasure. Despite their overwhelming sadism, you know that they only bully you because you're a huge masochist that loves being dominated and teased by them.

Experience the 2nd chapter of you and your giant, sadistic girlfriends sensual and sexual story.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
